subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Praise God that thou art a diffuser of divine fragrances and a servant of the Word of God after the ascension of the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق حمد کن خدا را که ناشر نفحاتی و خادم کلمه الله بعد از صعود جمال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise of Western values; culture
